{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323143030AFEA83F257FFCA219C13"}"},"total":1764},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618295520667484953","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好好看，作者大大的文笔也很好，是我看过最好看的末世群像文，写的很有趣，节奏也比较快，我很喜欢，这是在短剧上刷到才找到的这本小说，真的好好，作者大大把他们每个人物刻画得都很鲜活，真的是我看过最好看的末世群像文，这是我第一次把一本500多章的末世群像文看完，真的很推荐啊[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][送心][送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773782327,"group_id":"7485991648128666648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"承诺就像放屁，说时惊天动地，过后苍白无力","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N92wabDfup1U2fmeznkRlCqZQ6uVT8+SK8yQ9AGb9uc4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/61753deac7474b4bace62801b65c63fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788004&x-signature=5Okmnn45iy5MYZCNF6R9QeGK7hM%3D","user_id":"4099406231769495","user_name":"爱吃辣条的包子✪ω✪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4099406231769495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1757425474,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_info":{"abstract":"[女频文＋空间＋丧尸晶核＋群像＋异能＋动植物变异。]

鹿南歌穿书了，穿成了末世文里的炮灰——男配早死的妹妹！
原书中，鹿南歌之所以有名字，仅仅是因为男配会时常拿出全家福思念家人。
男主偶然看到照片，顺口问了一句，还夸赞了她。
没想到，就因为这一句夸赞，这个炮灰角色成功成为了读者心目中的娇软白月光！
毕竟，一心扑在事业上的男主，自始至终都只夸过鹿南歌。
...
穿书来的鹿南歌，开局就是原身死亡的车祸现场，在等死和末世艰难求生中，她选择了求生...

活都活了，那能动手还哔哔啥？
...
避雷！！！请仔细阅读：

1.团队文，女主并非孤狼！

2.开篇说过，女主穿的原书是男频文，因此前期‘原书男主’部分描写偏男频文，介意慎入！！！

3.女主前面摸不清楚情况会收敛一些，到了五十章，收敛...我可去你的吧！

4.女主穿书前，不过是芸芸众生间的普通人，没办法直接杀伐果断，需要不断成长，介意慎入！

5.主线是女主和团队的成长，cp在番外！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e77ed817f57c3d2743862497ae9073b6","author":"木枳枳","author_id":"","book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_name":"末世，炮灰带着主角团杀疯了","book_short_name":"穿书末世，我靠系统囤货逆袭","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"23.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7485991653698699800","read_count":"230960","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1132085"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"578","tags":"科幻末世,系统,空间,末世,穿书,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7f5af2e408c6d19ebc20d1732f513f50~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431430&x-signature=GRJsOwpXrEj3m8U23%2BuvTUp5TEE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101257350539","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1280"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323143030AFEA83F257FFCA219C13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读55小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":93170,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":198697,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1340},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773800324,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7595413860407690009","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最喜欢小队的相处日常，女生做饭男生自觉备菜，不会就学，团队战斗服从指挥，默契十足，对外唇枪舌战异能轰炸，对内互相信任护短得很~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768449693,"group_id":"7485991648128666648","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"91685758166"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"607"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":103228,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7595390061770064665","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主绑定系统重生在末世丧尸横行天灾人祸的小世界，从回家与重生的弟弟报团后疯狂囤货，到陆续又迎来哥哥和原主角团们组成小团队一起前往京市寻亲，一路上欢声笑语，并肩作战，剧情一路走偏，团宠竟是女主自己。女主日渐强大，空间加持，风系主攻，精神系爆头，可奶可攻，人格魅力拉满，小队成员渐渐以女主为中心，一路组团打怪升级拌嘴美食两不误，大家不圣母但有仁心，杀伐果断善恶分明，人均一张毒嘴，舔一口都能毒死自己的程度哈哈哈。全篇主要讲的就是女主他们团队一路打怪回京市的经历，主战斗描述和日常打闹，最后是带领全人类幸存者对抗末世对抗小世界规则。
女主伙伴“枝枝”【主人枝枝会一直跟你并肩作战】，“有有”一个为宿主据理力争，悄摸给宿主薅装备的可爱系统，“刚子”一只能说会道的臭美鹦鹉【美人~美人~】，护姐如命的“姐宝男”实力超强小弟弟，被姐弟俩排外的冤种大哥，”天道之子”原男主等小伙伴们都是打断骨头还连着筋的，相亲相爱的一家人。","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":9,"text":"末世丧尸","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%A7%E5%B0%B8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774247430CA219C13%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227595390061770064665%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227485991648128666648%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%A7%E5%B0%B8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768444945,"group_id":"7485991648128666648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+YWJC690e8q4J8v0EEg5v0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/333bc20b63db4c7a9a210f09596c1b09~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794574&x-signature=sbuxRX8yaNjCkvH8Nc%2FhMzyS0p8%3D","user_id":"91685758166","user_name":"小小嘿～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"91685758166","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_info":{"abstract":"[女频文＋空间＋丧尸晶核＋群像＋异能＋动植物变异。]

listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":102520,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":19050},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768445222,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7598178251160339224","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了，真的好看，番外也喜欢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769090563,"group_id":"7485991648128666648","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2472118280796254"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"971"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":121200,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":210110,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7598071859447563032","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看[赞]我太喜欢啊野弟弟了——势力强、脑子好，是超级姐控，自己还是个孩子一直想保护姐姐，真是个贴心宝宝。[飞吻]吱吱树宝宝也很可爱，实力强，又贴心，挖晶核能收，跟其他团队一起作战的时候怕晶核被抢走，神速扒拉到自己身边[偷笑]太可爱了。
女主团队的每个人品格和势力都很出色，作者把每个人的人设刻画得非常立体。整本书既搞笑又热血，团队有格局，在末世中不仅关心自己的生存，也会考虑他人，不会把超市等物资一扫而空，而是留给真正有需要的人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769067018,"group_id":"7485991648128666648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4n3MwdYZeucoG9mCiqh9XemuxPVEDJPBY2Sp+h1ubiI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/89a35b6e70db4ae4a30fbffdf7ff7a23~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794647&x-signature=TDBTwU%2BPsq2QHxXaLcsi%2FDJUgMo%3D","user_id":"2472118280796254","user_name":"香菜爱凉拌黄瓜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2472118280796254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7485991648128666648","book_info":{"abstract":"[女频文＋空间＋丧尸晶核＋群像＋异能＋动植物变异。]

原书中，鹿南歌之所以有名字，仅仅是因为男配会时常拿出全家福思念家人。
男主偶然看到照片，顺口问了一句，还夸赞了她。
没想到，就因为这一句夸赞，这个炮灰角色成功成为了读者心目中的娇软白月光！
毕竟，一心扑在事业上的男主，自始至终都只夸过鹿南歌。

1.团队文，女主并非孤狼！

2.开篇说过，女主穿的原书是男频文，因此前期‘原书男主’部分描写偏男频文，介意慎入！！！

3.女主前面摸不清楚情况会收敛一些，到了五十章，收敛...我可去你的吧！

4.女主穿书前，不过是芸芸众生间的普通人，没办法直接杀伐果断，需要不断成长，介意慎入！
